form.formComment: Last start finished 4th on April 11 over 300m at this track behind Kingsbrae Maggie beaten 2.75 lengths (18.20) in a Grade 5. Looks well placed and should prove hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Last start finished 6th over 300m at this track beaten 7 lengths (17.95) behind Remission Run in a Grade 5 on April 11. Around the mark two starts back. Winning chance on that form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished 6th over 300m at this track beaten 7 lengths (17.95) behind Remission Run in a Grade 5 on April 11. Around the mark two starts back. Winning chance on that form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Was awkwardly placed on heels and lost ground entering the first turn.

form.formComment: Showed good improvement when third behind Ricardo Got Zip at this track last start over 300m (18.30). Has to be included.
